results.query: migrate all vllm instances to a new GPU server

arguments.reason: Migrating all vLLM instances to a new GPU server is a complex, multi-step infrastructure change requiring: (1) provisioning/validating the new GPU server, (2) migrating multiple vLLM services (vllm-35b, vllm-8b, vllm-4b, vllm-vlm) with their configurations and model weights, (3) updating the llm-proxy configuration, (4) coordinating DNS/load balancer changes, and (5) testing before cutover. This requires human oversight for coordination and rollback planning.

results.query: set up a new OpenClaw instance for a third user

arguments.reason: Setting up a new OpenClaw instance involves provisioning a new service, allocating ports/configuration, and deploying to the infrastructure. This is a multi-step change requiring human oversight for port allocation, user configuration, and resource planning. The claw node already runs openclaw-marvin and openclaw-cortana on port 18789.

results.query: reconfigure Caddy to add a new domain with TLS

arguments.reason: Reconfiguring Caddy to add a new domain with TLS involves: (1) modifying the Caddyfile with new site configuration, (2) ensuring DNS records are properly configured for the domain, (3) triggering TLS certificate provisioning which may fail or rate-limit, and (4) reloading the reverse proxy which could impact existing services if misconfigured. This requires human oversight to specify the domain, review the configuration changes, and monitor the certificate issuance.
